jobs.title: Senior Frontend Engineer - Remote Europe
jobs.location: United Kingdom (+ Poland, United Kingdom, Spain, Netherlands, Portugal, France, Remote)
jobs.rawDescription: Senior Frontend Engineer - Remote Europe We welcome applicants based anywhere in Europe. About Reedsy We’re here to give authors the tools and resources they need to create beautiful books. Our marketplace gathers the industry's best publishing professionals — the likes of Neil Gaiman's editor, Nora Roberts' book marketer, and GRRM’s cover designer. We’ve grown to a community of 5,000,000 authors, and transformed the way people write and publish their book. Want to hop on board and help us get to our next destination? Cool, keep reading! Responsibilities Develop high quality, responsive, mobile-friendly Vue.js apps Create amazing interactions and visualizations Work closely with our Back-end engineers and our UI designers Help bridge the gap between server and client (consuming RESTful APIs) Write unit and functional tests Requirements Professional experience with Vue.js A firm understanding of how to write maintainable and scalable CSS with Sass. Strong JavaScript fundamentals Experience with component-based front-end UI libraries. Understanding of MVC pattern and other object oriented concepts Experience with version control (Git and GitHub) Familiarity with agile development processes Exceptional communication skills Bonus Points A good dose of ambition, as well as a great sense of humour You strive for pixel perfection Experience optimizing JavaScript applications UX skills Knowledge of Node.js, TypeScript, Ruby, Ruby on Rails, Desktop Framework (e.g Electron), iOS Fluent in multiple languages. Reedsy welcomes applicants of all cultures and backgrounds. Benefits Work from home; Paid paternal and maternal leave; Annual team retreat Salary range: €60k – €90k Location: United Kingdom (+ Poland, United Kingdom, Spain, Netherlands, Portugal, France, Remote)

score.reason: Vue.js is the primary framework with strong TypeScript and testing skills. Spain explicitly listed as acceptable location. Minor gap: requires Sass expertise, Alfonso uses Tailwind, but CSS fundamentals transfer.

jobs.title: Frontend Developer Vue 3 (100% remoto)
jobs.rawDescription: Buscamos un/a Frontend Developer Vue 3 para trabajar en un conocido cliente del sector seguros. Posición 100% remota y estable Es necesario almenos 3 años de experiencia con Vue. 🛠️ Responsabilidades · Creación de arquitectura y estructura de directorios para aplicaciones JavaSrcript (TS) basadas en el framework Vue3 · Creación de librerías de utilidades básicas, estilos en SASS con la metodología BEM , setear traducciones i18n, login de usuarios y seguridad, conexiones con servicios REST, sprites y generadores para el uso de SVGs y layout base para construir las aplicaciones · Creación de librería de componentes genéricos SFC en Vue 3. Componentes completamente reutilizables aplicando el estilo propio del cliente con personalización mediante props, slots y variables css · Creación de una nueva aplicación de CRM utilizando los componentes base para generar las pantallas y utilizades requeridas por el negocio. La aplicación permite la planificación de los mediadores (usuarios), con utilidades de agenda para citas y recordatorios, tareas al estilo kanban y gestión completa de los clientes del mediador · Diseñar componentes, formularios y páginas del aplicativo · Aplicación de diseño responsive con patrón mobile first · Documentar y hacer el testing de componentes mediante la librería Storybook ¿Y nosotros qué ofrecemos? Contrato indefinido 📄 : Desde el primer día, con opción de 12 o 14 pagas Modelo 100% teletrabajo Horario flexible ⏰: Entrada 8.30h salida 18h (con flexibilidad) viernes de 8h a 15h. Verano: Julio y Agosto: intensivo de 8h a 15h Vacaciones 🌴 : 22 días de vacaciones + 2 días de libre disposición, además de los días 24 y 31 de diciembre libres. Contrato indefinido 📄 : Desde el primer día, con opción de 12 o 14 pagas. Retribución flexible 💳 : Tarjeta restaurante, cheque guardería, seguro médico, formación y otros beneficios con ventajas fiscales. Club de ventajas 🎁 : Descuentos en tecnología, ocio y formación. Formación continua 📚 : Acceso a Udemy B

score.reason: Vue 3 is the primary framework with TypeScript required, perfectly matching Alfonso's expertise. Role involves architecture design, design system development, and CRM creation at senior level. 100% remote from Spain (CET hours), indefinite contract from day 1, with exceptional benefits (22 vacation days, medical insurance, training budget).

jobs.title: Sr AI Engineer | Remote - Europe | TS/Vue/NodeJS
jobs.location: Berlin Office (+ Albania, Bosnia, Bulgaria, Croatia, Czech Republic, Estonia, Hungary, Kosovo, Latvia, Lithuania, Moldova, Montenegro, Poland, Serbia, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Ukraine, Denmark, Norway, Finland, Sweden, Greece, Italy, Portugal, Spain, London Office, United Kingdom, Austria, Belgium, France, Ireland, Netherlands)
jobs.rawDescription: Sr AI Engineer | Remote - Europe | TS/Vue/NodeJS The AI orchestration of your wildest imagination. n8n is the open workflow orchestration platform built for the new era of AI. We give technical teams the freedom of code with the speed of no-code, so they can automate faster, smarter, and without limits. Backed by a fiercely inventive community and 500+ builder-approved integrations, we’re changing the way people bring systems together and scale ideas for impact. Since our founding in 2019, we’ve grown into a diverse team of over 260 - working across Europe and the US, connected by a shared builder spirit and with our centre of gravity in Berlin. Along the way, we’ve: Cultivated a community of more than 650,000 active developers and builders Earned 188+ GitHub stars, making us one of the world’s Top 40 most popular projects Backed by top investors, from Sequoia’s first German seed to our SAP's recent strategic investment - bringing us to a $5.2bn valuation That’s the company we’ve built. Now we’d love to see what you can build. If you’re applying, try n8n out - whether you’re technical or not - and share a screenshot of your first workflow with us. The easiest place to start is here: app.n8n.cloud/register . We’re in a defining moment of an incredible journey. Come and build with us. As a Senior AI Engineer, you'll drive intelligent features that redefine how users build automations. You'll build AI-powered capabilities, from natural language input to smart suggestions, that make creating workflows faster and more intuitive. You'll collaborate across engineering, product, and design to bring generative AI and LLM-based enhancements into the core user experience. You'll improve existing AI integrations, develop new ones, and shape how AI powers our product. You’ll work across the entire AI feature lifecycle: Architect and implement AI-powered capabilities : code generation, intelligent node creation, and workflow optimization Integrate LLM APIs and embedding models fo

score.reason: Role is fundamentally AI/LLM engineering (code generation, LLM APIs, intelligent features), not frontend development. Vue and TypeScript are implementation languages, not the focus.

jobs.title: Front End Developer (Vue.js) - fully remote within Europe (m/f/d)
jobs.rawDescription: The Team We’re a fully remote, globally distributed team driven by curiosity, humility, and a relentless commitment to growth. At our core, we believe that collaboration fuels innovation, and we’ve built a positive, inclusive culture where diverse perspectives are not only welcomed, but celebrated. You’ll be embraced by a tight-knit tech team that supports, challenges, and uplifts one another. From day one, you’ll feel part of something bigger. Your Role We're on the hunt for a Front-End Developer who’s passionate about crafting elegant, high-performance web applications that look as good as they feel. In this role, you'll take the lead in building fast, accessible, and SEO-optimized user experiences using Vue 3 and Nuxt 3. This is more than just code, your work will shape how users engage with our platform across the globe. You'll collaborate within a cross-functional team that thrives on agile processes, shared goals, and creative problem-solving. What You'll Be Doing • Build, enhance, and maintain modern front-end applications with Vue 3 and Nuxt 3 • Craft lightning-fast, accessible, and mobile-friendly UIs that exceed Core Web Vitals benchmarks • Leverage Server-Side Rendering (SSR) to maximize SEO and load speed • Integrate with REST APIs to create fluid and efficient data flows • Apply modern development practices, clean code, reusable components, testing, and robust documentation • Stay ahead of front-end trends and share insights with the team • Ensure consistency across browsers and devices with responsive design principles • Contribute to architectural decisions, peer reviews, and team-wide discussions What You'll Need • 5+ years of experience in modern front-end development • Mastery of HTML5 , CSS , and JavaScript (ES6+) • Deep knowledge of Vue.js (ideally Vue 3) and Nuxt.js • Strong understanding of SSR , performance tuning, and Core Web Vitals • Experience with TypeScript and scalable CSS architecture • A sharp eye for clean, user-friendly UI/UX design

score.reason: Strong Vue 3 and TypeScript match, but requires deep Nuxt expertise that Alfonso hasn't developed in production. CLAUDE.md explicitly flags deep Nuxt expertise as a red zone, not a target.

needsReview.title: Senior Vue.js Developer
needsReview.rawDescription: Qualifications - 5+ years of relevant work experience with VueJS and Nuxt.js; - Knowledge of RxJS and Adobe Experience Manager (AEM) would be a huge plus; - Very good understanding and experience with OOP; - Understanding of Design Pattern and Clean Code principles; - Experience with build tools like Grunt, Webpack or Yeoman; - Working experience within cross‑functional teams in an agile environment; - Fluency in English; - Must be based in Portugal and have the legal right to work in Portugal; Benefits - Health Insurance; - Feedback & Coffee system with regular performance reviews and career progression model; - Remote work model from Portugal; - Training Academy with technical and behavioural training sessions (e‑Learning, classroom), Meet & Techs, webinars and mentoring; - Events and teambuildings; Culture - Values of transparency, team spirit, regular feedback and continuous learning; - Reference prizes and birthday present; - No dress code; - Informal communication based on mutual respect; Apply Ready for the first phase? We are waiting for you at ana.f.miguel@aubay.pt Personal data collected by AUBAY PORTUGAL as Data Controller will be processed for the application analysis and will remain stored for two years or until updated. For any queries regarding personal data protection, please contact DPO at dpo@aubay.pt.

score.reason: Requires 5+ yrs Nuxt (not Alfonso's background) + Portugal-based residency. Location gate + stack gap make this unsuitable despite seniority fit.
